heading: Appropriate congressional committees defined
label: 9801 Appropriate congressional committees defined
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–94, div. J, title V, § 501133 Stat. 3060Dec. 20, 2019“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Global Fragility Act of 2019’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–94, div. J, title V, § 501133 Stat. 3060Dec. 20, 2019“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Global Fragility Act of 2019’.”

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Foreign Relations and the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Foreign Affairs and the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Relevant Federal department or agency
children.label: 2 Relevant Federal department or agency
children.text: The term “relevant Federal department or agency” means the Department of State, the United States Agency for International Development, the Department of Defense, the Department of Treasury, and any other Federal department or agency the President determines is relevant to carry out the purposes of this chapter.1So in original. Probably should be followed by “the”.1
